name: Henry David Thoreau
abstract: Henry David Thoreau (born David Henry Thoreau; July 12, 1817 – May 6, 1862) was an American naturalist, essayist, poet, and philosopher. A leading transcendentalist, he is best known for his book Walden, a reflection upon simple living in natural surroundings, and his essay "Civil Disobedience" (originally published as "Resistance to Civ…

about_quotes.speaker: James Lincoln Collier
about_quotes.evidence: My great grandmother, through various family connections, knew the family of Henry David Thoreau. And in fact my great great grandmother boarded with the Thoreaus.
about_quotes.doc_title: James Lincoln Collier interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 14, 2007
